ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot interacting with a pie, starting with both arms at rest and ending with one arm reaching out to grab the pie.  The sequence will emphasize a sense of anticipation and gentle movement.  The robot's body will be stationary, only the arms will move. Frame 1 shows both arms at the robot's sides, in a neutral position. Frame 2 shows the right arm moving forward and upward, indicating an approach to the pie. Frame 3 shows the right arm extended toward the pie, as if the robot is about to gently take a slice.  The left arm remains slightly elevated to maintain balance. Frame 4 shows the right hand hovering above the pie, suggesting a moment of contemplation before taking a slice.

frames.beat: both arms rest at the sides, ready for pie
the right arm begins to reach forward, anticipating
the right arm extends further, aiming for the pie
the right hand hovers, ready to take a slice
